ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the student is enrolled */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the student (M/F) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address type (U = Urban, R = Rural) */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size (LE3 = Less than or equal to 3, GT3 = Greater than 3) */,
  "pstatus" TEXT /* Parental cohabitation status (A = Apart, T = Together) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for choosing the school */,
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary guardian of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  "language_spoken_at_home" TEXT /* Language spoken at home */,
  "previous_schools_attended" TEXT /* Previous schools attended by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_reason FOREIGN KEY ("reason") REFERENCES reasons ("reason_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_guardian_id FOREIGN KEY ("guardian_id") REFERENCES guardians ("guardian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., MS = Middle School, HS = High School) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "school_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can accommodate */,
  "school_rating" TEXT /* School rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "extracurricular_activities" TEXT /* List of extracurricular activities and sports teams */,
  "campus_type" TEXT /* Type of campus (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guardians" (
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guardian */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guardian */,
  "guardian_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the guardian to the student (e.g., mother, father, other) */,
  "guardian_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the guardian */,
  "guardian_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the guardian */,
  "guardian_income" TEXT /* Income level of the guardian */,
  "guardian_education_level" TEXT /* Educational level of the guardian */,
  "guardian_relationship_status" TEXT /* Relationship status of the guardian (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guardian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent */,
  "parent_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the parent */,
  "parent_education" TEXT /* Educational level of the parent */,
  "parent_address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "parent_employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the parent (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason for choosing the school */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  "reason_category" TEXT /* Category of the reason (e.g., academic, extracurricular, location) */,
  "reason_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the reason (e.g., 1 = High, 2 = Medium, 3 = Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size (LE3 = Less than or equal to 3, GT3 = Greater than 3) */,
  "pstatus" TEXT /* Parental cohabitation status (A = Apart, T = Together) */,
  "mother_education" TEXT /* Educational level of the mother */,
  "father_education" TEXT /* Educational level of the father */,
  "mother_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the mother */,
  "father_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the father */,
  "family_income" TEXT /* Income level of the family */,
  "family_structure" TEXT /* Family structure (e.g., single-parent household, blended family) */,
  "parental_involvement" TEXT /* Level of parental involvement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the school where the student is enrolled
